entry.catalyst: Implementing Goal Tracker - multi-session planning system
entry.stateOfMind: Focused, methodical, building infrastructure for future sessions

actions.description: Ran full test suite: 45 tests passing
Discovered: Goal Tracker supports active/dormant/completed/abandoned status
Discovered: Goals can link to sessions, creating session-to-goal traces
Discovered: Priority system: critical > high > medium > low
Discovered: Progress notes with timestamps enable longitudinal tracking

discoveries: Goals can link to sessions, creating session-to-goal traces
Priority system: critical > high > medium > low
Progress notes with timestamps enable longitudinal tracking

exit.summary: Goal Tracker v1 complete: 18 tests, 45 total passing. Created 3 strategic goals for future sessions.
exit.nextCuriosity: Continue session recording; pick a goal to work on: Vision Integration or Memory Strategy Design
exit.feeling: Accomplished, methodical, excited about having a planning framework
